title: minuartia tenuissima subsp. harantii
intro: Minuartia tenuissima subsp. harantii, also known as Harant's least willow-herb or Harant's minuartia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Minuartia tenuissima subsp. harantii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
